mnemonics.title: NoSQL Types
mnemonics.content: KDCG: Key-Value, Document, Column-Family, Graph (King David’s Crown Glitters)

acronyms.expansion: Basically Available, Soft state, Eventual consistency
acronyms.usage: Describes NoSQL consistency models vs. ACID

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a table where rows are identified by keys and columns are grouped into families.

analogies.analogy: Like a social network map showing connections between people (nodes) and relationships (edges).
